questions.scenario: An order has line items, payment attempts, refunds, and support queries that join across those facts. Which data shape is this?
questions.explanation: Related business records that need constraints and joins are relational.

questions.scenario: The app needs to keep receipt PDF bytes and order status. Where should order status live?

options.text: In Cloud SQL or another operational database record, with the object name pointing to Cloud Storage.
Only in the PDF file name.

questions.explanation: Cloud Storage keeps bytes. The database keeps business state.
Cloud SQL fits when relationships and consistency rules matter.
